scripts.dev:apphosting: npm run build:functions && npx firebase-tools@latest emulators:start --only apphosting,functions,auth,firestore
scripts.dev:functions: npm run build:functions && npx firebase-tools@latest emulators:start --only functions,auth,firestore
scripts.build:web: npm --prefix apps/web install --workspaces=false && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run build:functions && npx firebase-tools@latest deploy --only functions
scripts.smoke:functions: SECRET_ENCRYPTION_KEY=${SECRET_ENCRYPTION_KEY:-local-dev-secret-key-32-bytes} npm run build:functions && SECRET_ENCRYPTION_KEY=${SECRET_ENCRYPTION_KEY:-local-dev-secret-key-32-bytes} npx firebase-tools@latest emulators:exec --only functions,firestore "node scripts/smoke-functions.mjs"
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @funqa/api run typecheck && npm --workspace @funqa/web run typecheck
